_swatchNote: Locked shoreline swatches only; no new colours (#D5A342, #B98535, #926B2A, #6C8B15, #427118). Per-band swatch-selection logic (which swatch is the band default vs. rare interior accent, and the sand/moss/grass interlock) is not recipe-driven -- it is hardcoded in composeShorelineCell() in scripts/compose-terrain-blend-family.mjs, per the v2 correction below.
_v2Note: v2 (2026-07-17): ChatGPT's PR #99 visual review found v1 read as a bright continuous mustard/gold outline with an inner-corner bullseye and near-invisible moss. Corrected material-selection formulas (band membership/q-thresholds unchanged) per ChatGPT's exact prescribed recipe: inner sand base flips to #B98535 (was #D5A342, now a rare hash%11==0 interior accent); outer sand base flips to #926B2A with interior hash%4==0 feathering to exact grass_a and hash%3==0 to #6C8B15; moss band gains an hash%5==0 #926B2A interlock ahead of its existing light/dark-moss/grass fallback chain. See AUDIT.md §"v2 correction" for measured before/after evidence.
